title: Brazilian-Style Fermented Rice Pancakes
description: A unique twist on traditional pancakes, incorporating fermented flavors and a crispy Brazilian twist.
instructions: Combine fermented rice, flour, and water in a bowl to form a batter.
Add Brazilian and mix until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
Serve crispy on top of the pancakes.
